OmniDataTransform.name: TransformDrinkingWaterSystemPermitTemplate

omniDataTransformItem.formulaConverted: | var:BLAccount:FacilityHA__c | var:BLAccount:FacilityHA__c ">" STRINGINDEXOF 1 + | var:BLAccount:FacilityHA__c "" STRINGINDEXOF SUBSTRING
omniDataTransformItem.name: TransformDrinkingWaterSystemPermitTemplate
